mapper.select: SELECT c.chunk_id AS chunkId, c.doc_id AS docId, c.kb_id AS kbId, d.title AS docTitle, c.content AS content, MATCH(c.content) AGAINST(#{query} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) AS score FROM ai_knowledge_chunk c INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_document d ON c.doc_id = d.doc_id AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.status = '0' INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_base b ON c.kb_id = b.kb_id AND b.del_flag = '0' AND b.status = '0' WHERE MATCH(c.content) AGAINST(#{query} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{topK}

SELECT c.chunk_id AS chunkId, c.doc_id AS docId, c.kb_id AS kbId, d.title AS docTitle, c.content AS content, 1 AS score FROM ai_knowledge_chunk c INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_document d ON c.doc_id = d.doc_id AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.status = '0' INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_base b ON c.kb_id = b.kb_id AND b.del_flag = '0' AND b.status = '0' WHERE c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY c.chunk_id DESC LIMIT #{topK}

SELECT c.chunk_id AS chunkId, c.doc_id AS docId, c.kb_id AS kbId, d.title AS docTitle, c.content AS content, c.page_num AS pageNum, c.embedding_json AS embeddingJson, 0 AS score FROM ai_knowledge_chunk c INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_document d ON c.doc_id = d.doc_id AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.status = '0' INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_base b ON c.kb_id = b.kb_id AND b.del_flag = '0' AND b.status = '0' WHERE c.embedding_json IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.chunk_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
